title: lycopodioides stolonifera
intro: Lycopodioides stolonifera, also known as Stolone Lycopod or Ground Pine, is a species of club moss belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lycopodioides stolonifera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lycopodioides stolonifera is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
